trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s 2025 capsule coffee test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top picks, providing fresh evidence from March 2025.
